and what her, you can call it mythological but historical relationship

Now I have to tell you about also the origin of Vishnumaya, which is very interesting.
Vishnumaya was a sister of Shri Krishna who has born after Shri Krishna had been born
actually she wasn't his own sister but he's daughter of Nanda and when Shri Krishna
taken over and put in care for Nandha and Yashoda they gave their daughters place
this, and the father of Shri Krishna brought it back.
So when Kansa came – now uncle you all know about story – to ask for eighth child
they said that is a child but he's not man, she was woman!
He took her in his hand and did like these and threw into sky
And there she went and then announced that Shri Krishna is already incarnated, He's
living.
So he was your killer so She' the announcer of the Incarnations
or something good going to happen also She can burn things which are not spiritually
At the time of Mahabharata, she was born as Draupadi and this Draupadi
Was a sister of Shri Rama. And when
As you know in Mahabaratha
All Of You Know The Story of Mahabharta I need not tell that
Duryodhana tried to take out her clothes
Then She Called for Krishna
First He Said Kri

Dwarika me shor bhayo

Big noise you can call it or what I don't know
Shora bhaiyo
Shora bhaiyobhari
tremendous
which we called the thunder
because she is one who's responsible of thunders

So now here Vishnumaya is one who

The Dharma

She is one who said, you have fight

so the relationship between Brother & Sister

Its loving

We've a very good incident of that India which I must tell you how this Rakhi bandhan
all these relationships with brothers & sisters are respected.
I mean, nobody will believe because in these countries where there is no relationship which
is respected we won't understand.
But when Alexander the Great came to India he conquered our country quite a lot but
then was one King Puru who defeated him and put Him into jail.
Alexander had married an Indian lady so it as day of this Rakhi Poornima she put

So they said the rakhi has come so that King said all right tie up the rakhi he didn't

He is my brother-in-law.

this is a graciousness you understand how could
be so stupid as
to arrest you? Alexander was full of agastate
couldn't understand his reaction
what's going on

He sent the brother in the home."

Went him to his wife smiling saying what's matter?
How am i here?
She asked do you know how she saved me from one threat?
She showed him a rock.
This thread you saved Me on?
Today is the day when a sister can tie this to her brother and the brother has do what
